Can't combine?
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2020 at 12:00 PM Rating: Good
NecroPost
View User Forum
Sage
152 posts
I get the message: You cannot make this combine because you fail to meet the requirements.

I am well over 300 in JC. I remember making these as a smaller toon years ago. What am I missing? I play on FV so no weird restrictions that I can recall.

EDIT: NM, progression server restriction. Blech.

Edited, Oct 17th 2020 1:01pm by NecroPost

Thats right, now you're married. Hope you like the giver. Remember you shouldn't accept/buy another - that's adultry.

▲ Page top
???
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2002 at 10:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758592260
15 posts
I am a lvl 20 Ranger and i bought one of these in EC for 40pp. I thought it was a steal and jumped on the deal when he told me the price. Im wondering why when i shout PC on this people say around 40-60pp and in costs about 65pp to make it. I also have an Enchanter who is rising in jewel craft skill and soon will make these. How much should i sell these for?
▲ Page top
RE: ???
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2003 at 1:01 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Sells back to merchants for about 65pp also, so anyone who sells for 40pp is either doing you a favor, or was dumb enough to sell without checking merchant price first.
▲ Page top
RE: ???
QuoteReply
# May 15 2003 at 6:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362410335
View User Forum
12 posts
Honestly? They go at bazaar mostly for 40-50pp really. I just got one for my Rogue 11. Should just check merchant price for fun (although I only have CHA 75). Perhaps this is a nice trick to get sleeping rich. Buy at bazaar for 40 and sell to merchant for 65 to buy a new one at bazaar for 40 - easy richdom - isn't that what a rogue is all about?
▲ Page top
RE: ???
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2003 at 8:51 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
40-60 is way too low for this. The general rule I'm told when it comes to trade skilled items is that you sell them for twice what they cost you to make. That way even your failures will eventually be covered over time. With bazaar, though, people sell stuff at cut rate prices to stay competitive with everyone else selling similar items. EQ economies are shifting more and more towards a buyers market, making it tough on tradeskillers or adventurers who accumulate a lot of extra gear in the course of their careers.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?

How do you make this?
▲ Page top
RE: HOW
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2001 at 5:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965788227
9 posts
Fire Emerald + enchanted bar of gold in a jeweler's kit.

Check out http://www.eqtraders.com or http://eq.castersrealm.com for more information on Jewelcrafting.
